title: didiscus pilosus var. preissii
intro: Didiscus pilosus var. preissii, also known as the Australian swamp pea, is a flowering plant that belongs to the Fabaceae family. It is traditionally used in Australian Indigenous medicine, particularly in Western Australia, where it is valued for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is rich in flavonoids and other bioactive compounds that have been shown to have antioxidant and cardiovascular health benefits. Didiscus pilosus var. preissii can be prepared as a tea or infusion for medicinal use, and it is also used in traditional remedies for colds, fever, and skin conditions.
